title: typeof narrowing
instruction:
TypeScript narrows union types inside conditional blocks. Use `typeof` to narrow primitive types.

Run this.
successMessage: Inside each branch, TypeScript knows the exact type — `value.toFixed()` is only allowed in the `number` branch.

title: instanceof narrowing
instruction:
Use `instanceof` to narrow class instances. TypeScript understands the class hierarchy.

Run this.
successMessage: `instanceof` narrows to the specific class. TypeScript knows which methods are available in each branch.

title: Custom type guard
instruction:
A function returning `value is Type` is a custom type guard — it narrows the type in the calling code.

Run this.
successMessage: Custom type guards let you encapsulate complex narrowing logic in a reusable function. The `is` keyword is only valid in return type position.
